# ContosoDashboard Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-03-23

## Active Technologies
- C# 11, .NET 10 / ASP.NET Core 10 + Entity Framework Core, ASP.NET Core Authorization, Blazor Server, FluentValidation (or custom validators), Azure.Storage.Queues, Azure.Storage.Blobs, Microsoft.Azure.Functions.Worker, optional XUnit for tests (001-document-upload-management)
- SQL Server (local DB), local filesystem (secure upload directory outside `wwwroot`), Azure Queue Storage (for background processing), Azure Blob Storage (for scanned files) (001-document-upload-management)

- C# 11, .NET 10 / ASP.NET Core 10 + Entity Framework Core, ASP.NET Core Authorization, Blazor Server, FluentValidation (or custom validators), optional XUnit for tests (001-document-upload-management)
